channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morocco beats World Cup co-host Canada 3-0 and advances to the quarterfinals
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice as Morocco defeated Canada 3-0 in the World Cup round of 16, becoming the first African nation to reach the quarterfinals.

item.title: Mourners call for vengeance as Iran's slain leader's funeral begins
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's flag-draped casket was displayed in Tehran, with millions expected at the funeral.

item.title: America 250: David Muir explores national parks and the Native tribes that call them home
item.description: As the U.S. celebrates its 250th birthday this Fourth of July, honoring the nation's natural wonders is a fitting tribute.

item.title: This week on 'Sunday Morning' (July 5)
item.description: A preview of the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.
